nredisstack_sync.signature: StreamCreateConsumerGroup(RedisKey key, RedisValue groupName, RedisValue? position, CommandFlags flags)

params.name: key
params.description: The key of the stream.

params.name: groupName
params.description: The name of the group to create.

params.name: position
params.description: The position to begin reading the stream. Defaults to NewMessages.

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags to use for this operation.

returns.description: true if the group was created, false otherwise.
